runner.interrupted_reason: Stopped after a 10-minute no-inclusion lower bound; the normal benchmark JSON artifact was not emitted.

chain_state.latest_seen_blocks: New blocks above the LFB were empty, non-final support/recovery blocks. The old 100x75 non-final deploy blocks at 631-643 remained visible.

log_evidence.message: Benchmark started submitting rspace-leadership-150x50-20260713T193527Z with validAfter=633.
validator1 logs contained 150 Received DeployData entries for the run id.
Deploy selection for block #641: pool=0, valid=0, alreadyInScope=0, selected=0 after ordinary user deploy selection was deferred to the deploy-inclusion leader.
Deploy selection for block #647: pool=0, valid=0, alreadyInScope=0, selected=0; proposals continued as finality support only.
A separate recovery proposal selected 5 recovered deploys for block #642, but the benchmark scanner still found 0 hit blocks for this 150x50 run id.

versus_100x75.interpretation: 150x50 submitted faster than 100x75 but regressed before Rholang execution: no deploy-carrying block for this run was observed.

notes: This is not a clean 150x50 performance benchmark because the shard was already stuck with LFB 633 and non-final 100x75 deploy branches.
The useful measurement is that 150 deploys were accepted quickly, but no block carrying the 150x50 run id appeared within the 602s observation window.
Because no hit block was found, phlo cost, Rholang compute, queryability, and finalized canonical coverage were not measurable for this run.
